title: Metal shadow depth-clip clamp / depth read-write hazard / MSL autorelease leaks (M3.2)

history.note: Landed dc55008 (depth-clip clamp on shadow pass) + 73bbdac (1x1 far-cleared dummy depth instead of live scene depth attachment as shadow fallback) + e8d283a (@autoreleasepool around each MSL compile). NOT verified: renderer_parity scenes are facility_scissor/surface_sky_fog/world_attrs — none shadow-casting — so the parity smoke does not guard the shadow depth-clip/fallback; the autorelease leak is not pixel-observable at all. Needs a shadow-parity scene (+ leak/robustness assertion).
